easter-bunny-buns-quarkhasen-pequereceta.name: Easter Bunny Buns (quarkhasan)

ingredients.item: 250 g quark cheese or frosted fresh cheese
1 sachet of baking powder or powder (16 g)

instructions: Mix quark cheese or bawden cheese cream, milk, sunflower oil, sugar and salt with a bawder to get a soft mass. In another container, mix flour and yast or baking powder, then add them to the quarter cheese mixture. Then mix them up.
Put the mass onto a pitted face and love with your hands up to a homogenous mass.
Expand the dough until its thickness of 1 -1.5 cm and cut the rabbits with the help of a rabbit cutter (we have chosen this model).
Then put the cheesebies onto a baking plate with baking paper. Beat an egg with a teaspoon of milk and brush the rabbits with this mixture.
Hornite the Easter Bunnies with a pre-heated oven at 180 ″ 3 ″ (with heat up and down) for 15 minutes.
Once they're ready, put up the cheesebies still hot with butter and then put them up for sugar.

easter-cod-with-almonds-teleculinaria.name: Easter Cod With Almonds
instructions: Peel and slice the onions and garlic teeth. Spread it on the bottom of a tray, water with a little olive oil and place on top of the peeled chips. Season with salt and light in the oven, preheated at 180oC, for 30 minutes.
However, in a processor, roughly crush the almonds with the parsley and reserve.

After the time indicated, remove the tray from the oven, add the cod and water with plenty of olive oil. Spread over the mixture of almond and parsley and put it back in the oven for another 30 minutes, or until the cod is cooked. Serve right away.

egg-and-salad-sandwich-lezzet.name: Egg And Salad Sandwich
instructions: 1. Cook the eggs to be solid and leave to spoil.
2. peel off the shells and get to a bowl.
3.  Havucu rendeleyerek ekleyin.
4. Crochet and molten pepper.
5. Add and mix salt, pepper, stream and mayonsia.
6. Share the egg salad between cut the bread into two pieces.
7. Place and serve tomato slices between breads.

egg-white-chalupa.name: Egg White Chalupa

ingredients.item: Yellow or red bell pepper (or half of each)

instructions: Heat butter in a large pot over medium. Add bell pepper, onion, jalapeño, and garlic and cook, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are very soft, 10–12 minutes. Add beans and chicken broth. Bring to a simmer and cook, stirring occasionally, until liquid is reduced by half and thickened, 20–25 minutes. Stir in cilantro; season with salt and pepper. Keep warm.

Pour oil into a small skillet to come ¼" up the sides. Heat over medium-high until very hot. Working one at a time, fry tortillas until lightly browned and very crisp, about 1 minute per side. Transfer to paper towels to drain.

Melt 1 Tbsp. butter in a small nonstick skillet over medium heat. When butter begins to foam, add 3 egg whites and a pinch of salt and cook, stirring constantly with a rubber spatula and forming a compact bundle, until whites are set but still moist, about 1 minute. Transfer to a plate. Repeat with remaining 1 Tbsp. butter and 3 egg whites.
Divide sour cream between tortillas. Top with ½ cup bean mixture, followed by lettuce, egg whites, a drizzle of hot sauce, cheese, avocado, and cilantro.

eggplant-pie-with-feta-cheese-argiro.name: Eggplant Pie With Feta Cheese

ingredients.item: 4 dry onions finely chopped or grated in a thick grutter
4 dry onions finely chopped or grated in a thick grutter

instructions: We'll use a shadow pan for pie, 40 cm.
Peel the eggs, cut them into a frame and put them in a bowl of water, so they don't suck too much oil into the pan.
Place the onion in the pan, over medium heat, for about 5-6 minutes, to drink its liquids.
Add 1/4 of the olive oil and sauce for 4-5 minutes.
Add the eggs, after having them squeezed very well, so that the waters go away.
Mix the mixture and sauce for 5-6 minutes for the eggsplants.
Add the grated tomato and bottle the filling over medium heat for about 10 minutes.
To the end of the boil, add the trahanas, salt, pepper and sprinkle with parsley.
Let the filling in low heat complete drink its liquids.
After the mixture cools, add the feta cheese and eggs, beaten.
Set the 3 leaves radially, oiling them in between, and wrinkle them lightly.
Set the 4° Leaf, slightly strained.
Pour the filling into the baking pan and straighten its dickness.
We turn the leaves that are prominent, inward, on to the pie.
Cover with the remaining 2 sets and make them wrinkled, oiling in between.
Sprinkle the pie into pieces.
Sprinkle the surface of the pie with the remaining olive oil and some water.
Bake in a well preheated oven at 180°C for about 1 hour, to brown well and remove the whole pie from the baking pan.

eggplant-with-cheese-lezzet.name: Eggplant With Cheese
instructions: 1. Cut the eggplants to wash and cut to two.
2. Drink bake olive oil from over 200 degrees until softened in the oven.
3. Remove space from the edges of sacs up to 1 cm and leave the inner spoon.
4. Rended the yellowish and roast in light-and-gray olive oil.
5. Friction, kimyon, salt and pepper, and cook for 3-4 minutes.
6. Add and cool your Patlıcan interior
7. Kü to the mixture;p dried raw, lor cheese, reindeed cheese and fruff eggs to the whipped eggs and fill the eggs into the interior
8. Cook for 30 minutes in 190 degrees oven.
9. Serve hot.

eggplant-mozzarella-and-saffron-rice-bak.name: Eggplant, Mozzarella, And Saffron Rice Bake
instructions: Arrange racks in top and bottom thirds of oven; preheat to 425°. Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add onion; cook, stirring often, until softened, about 8 minutes. Add rice; cook, stirring constantly, for 3 minutes. Stir in saffron, then wine. Cook until wine reduces slightly, about 1 minute. Add broth; season with salt. Cover and cook over medium heat until rice is very al dente and still crunchy, about 6 minutes; remove pan from heat.

Meanwhile, divide eggplant between two rimmed baking sheets, overlapping slightly to fit. Drizzle 1 cup oil over; season with salt and pepper. Bake, turning eggplant and rotating sheets halfway through, until tender and golden brown, 20–25 minutes.
Cover the bottom of a 13x9x2-inch baking dish with 1 cup tomato sauce. Sprinkle 1/3 of mozzarella over, then 1/3 of Parmesan.

Cover with a layer of eggplant rounds, overlapping so no sauce is visible beneath them. Add saffron rice, spreading out in an even layer. Sprinkle over another 1/3 each of mozzarella and Parmesan, then 1/2 of the remaining tomato sauce and another layer of eggplant. Top with remaining tomato sauce and remaining mozzarella and Parmesan. Cover dish with foil; transfer to a foil-lined baking sheet.
Bake until sauce is bubbling and cheese is melted, about 15 minutes. Uncover dish and bake until golden on top, about 20 minutes longer. Let stand for at least 10 minutes to set before serving.

eggs-with-sausage-lezzet.name: Eggs With Sausage
instructions: 1. Sucuklu egg is one of the indispensable tastes of our ramazan tables.
2. Fine sliced 10-15 slices of water 1 teaspoon of liquid oil in an added pan.
3. Add 2 eggs without whipping.
4. Bake 1-2 minutes without closing the cover.
5. Take from the fire and taste 1 pinch with salt and spices you want.
6. Serve hot.

place onion and pits cut into julians into a bowl, with low salt and scuba olive oil. That's a good mix.

enjoy-this-beef-bowl-with-spicy-honey-a-.name: Enjoy This Beef Bowl With Spicy Honey, A Very Viral Recipe On Social Networks
enjoy-this-beef-bowl-with-spicy-honey-a-.original_name: Disfruta de este bowl de carne de res con miel picante, una receta muy viral en redes sociales

ingredients.item: 500 gr de camotes medianos pelados y cortados en cubos
300 gr de carne molida de res (magro preferible)
1 mature avocado, cut into cubes or sheets
2-3 cdas de miel picante (o miel mezclada con chile)
Paprika, ajo en polvo, comino o mezcla de diversas especias (opcional)

instructions: It purifies the oven to 220 been 3 been or the air fryer to 200 been 3 been.
Mix camote cubes with oil, salt, pepper and paprika. Fairy or frying purée till they are golden and tender (20-25 min).
Fits ground meat with salt, pepper and spices up to completely golden (8-10 min).
Divide el camote y la carne en dos tazones.
Add the cottage cheese to the centre or to the side of each bowl.
Put your avocado and scuba with hot honey to your taste.
Adjust the date and serve at once, enjoying the contrast of flavors and temperatures.

espresso-old-fashioned.name: Espresso Old Fashioned
instructions: Combine espresso, bourbon, if using, simple syrup, and bitters in a cocktail shaker and fill with ice. Stir until outside of shaker is frosty, about 30 seconds; strain into a lowball glass filled with ice. Twist lemon peel over cocktail to release oils, then rub over the rim of glass; discard peel.

everything-pork-dry-rub.name: Everything Pork Dry Rub
instructions: Mix paprika, sugar, salt, garlic powder, black pepper, chili powder, cayenne pepper, onion powder, ground chipotle, cumin, and mustard powder together in a bowl. Store in an airtight container or keep in the freezer in a resealable plastic bag.

exquisite-pie.name: Exquisite Pie
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C (165 degrees C).
In a large mixing bowl combine eggs, sugar, and butter. Beat until smooth. Add vinegar, vanilla, and lemon juice. Mix thoroughly. Fold in pecans, coconut, and raisins. Pour mixture into pie shells.
Bake in preheated oven for 40 minutes or until completely set in center.
